Your complete resource for managing players, transactions, and growing your business.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

How do I become a 1xBet agent?

To become an agent, you need to contact a manager, provide the necessary documentation, and meet the initial requirements for player management.

What is the minimum withdrawal amount?

The minimum withdrawal amount depends on your specific payment method and region. Please check the "Withdrawals" section for more details.

Glossary of Terms

MobCash
The official application used by 1xBet agents to manage player deposits and withdrawals.
EPOS Balance
The electronic balance held by an agent used to facilitate player transactions.
Subagent
An individual recruited by an agent to help manage players and expand the network.
